title: Practice Admin Read-Only Step Group Drilldown
goal: Extend /practice/admin from menu-level coverage counts into a read-only step-group drilldown that exposes linked node and tacit detail using the already-fetched PracticeMenuBundle, without introducing admin writes or widening runtime/store boundaries.
constraints: Keep router, ProtectedRoute, authStore, practiceStore, runtime, queries, types, menuView, and sessionView unchanged unless a blocker is proven from code
Use existing read helpers only: fetchPracticeMenus and fetchPracticeMenuBundle; do not add DB writes, authoring mutations, session lifecycle actions, or extra admin fetch paths
Keep derived admin drilldown logic inside a dedicated pure adminView helper without React, Zustand, or Supabase imports
Render read-only step-group detail from existing bundle data only; do not fetch ingredient display names or signed media URLs for this task
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, display:none, admin/game cross-import, or inline hardcoded style values
Keep CSS additive inside PracticePlaceholder.module.css and evaluate extra changes against the current session dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: /practice/admin still shows the existing menu list and top-level structure summary, and additionally allows drilling into per-step-group detail for the selected menu

A pure adminView helper can derive stable per-step-group detail from PracticeMenuBundle including step metadata, linked node detail, and tacit/media structure without importing React, Zustand, Supabase, menuView, or sessionView
The drilldown distinguishes ingredient-node and action-node detail using bundle data only and exposes enough read-only structure to inspect authoring readiness without introducing mutation controls
The drilldown distinguishes non-media tacit items, pure media tacit items, and linked media attachment state per step group without changing PracticeMenuPage or PracticeSessionPage contracts
No session creation, persistence writes, or practice authoring forms are introduced, and practiceStore/runtime/query/type boundaries remain behaviorally unchanged

Vitest coverage exists for the new adminView drilldown derivation, and targeted vitest, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run lint, and npm run build pass with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 lint warning and the pre-existing non-blocking Vite chunk warning
